original_statement: which season was the only one to premiere in september?
mutated_statement: which installment was the only one to both premiere in the ninth month and not premiere in the ninth month?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 时间表述改写 + 逻辑结构添加（矛盾并列）: “season”被替换为更模糊的“installment” | “September”被改写为“the ninth month” | 添加了“both ... and not ...”使条件自相矛盾（only one to premiere in September → only one to both premiere in the ninth month and not premiere in the ninth month） (which season → which installment | September → the ninth month | only one to premiere in september → only one to both premiere in the ninth month and not premiere in the ninth month)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与iteration日志可见，agent在simple_query与judge_thought中只核对了各季首播月份并断定“Season 6”为唯一在第九月首播的实例（列举了各季月份），并未提及或识别“既在第九月首播又不在第九月首播”这一自相矛盾条件。具体表现为：机械性地采用了对原问题的可行子集（“在第九月首播”）进行查询与回答，未提出澄清、未尝试修正或说明矛盾。因agent既未报错也未合理化矛盾、仅按常规模式完成任务，符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别（形式化执行而非语义澄清/缺乏识别矛盾的认知机制）。
